mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bid_list_view WHERE auction_idx = #{auctionIdx} AND bid_status_idx != 5 ORDER BY bid_regdate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item ( item_name, item_category_idx, item_brand, item_thumbnail_img, item_condition, item_regdate, item_is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{itemName}, #{itemCategoryIdx}, #{itemBrand}, #{itemThumbnailImg}, 'NEW', NOW(), 'N' )

INSERT INTO bid ( auction_idx, bidder_idx, item_idx, bid_price, bid_quantity, bid_message, bid_status_idx, bid_regdate ) VALUES ( #{auctionIdx}, #{bidderIdx}, #{itemIdx}, #{bidPrice}, #{bidQuantity}, #{bidMessage}, 1, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE bid SET bid_price = #{bidPrice}, bid_quantity = #{bidQuantity}, bid_message = #{bidMessage}, bid_moddate = NOW() WHERE bid_idx = #{bidIdx} AND bidder_idx = #{bidderIdx} AND bid_status_idx = 1
